notes: Excellent work. All decade averages match expected values precisely (1880s: -0.212°C, 2010s: +0.805°C, 2020s partial: +0.980°C). Largest transition correctly identified as 2000s→2010s (+0.217°C). Variability measures accurate (2010s most variable at 0.145°C, 1920s least at 0.068°C). Source comparison shows GISTEMP-gcag correlation r≈0.993 with mean absolute difference 0.084°C, all matching expectations. Report includes all six required sections with properly formatted markdown tables. Comparative analysis is thorough: progressive warming narrative, identification of mid-century plateau and recent acceleration, per-decade extremes clearly noted, and cross-source agreement discussed. Structure flows logically from data to interpretation. Completeness: decade averages, transitions, variability, extremes, source comparison, and summary all present.
